description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy resembling a small, long-haired dog, possibly a Shih Tzu or Lhasa Apso. Its body is rounded and covered in a mottled pattern of gray, black, and white, giving the appearance of a fluffy, textured fur coat. The head is large and rounded with floppy ears that hang down on either side, and the face is somewhat obscured by the long fur, but a snout and dark eyes are faintly visible. The legs are short and stubby, supporting the body in a standing posture. The tail is curled and sits atop the back, blending into the rest of the fur. The overall appearance is soft, cuddly, and well-worn, suggesting it is a beloved toy.
description: A plush stuffed toy shaped like a small, long-haired dog with mottled gray, black, and white fur, floppy ears, and a curled tail. Its body is rounded and soft, with a friendly, cuddly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded face, floppy ears, and the dense, textured fur covering the head and chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the floppy ear, and the curled tail, with the legs visible beneath the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back, the base of the tail, and the hind legs, with the fur pattern continuing across the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head profile, floppy ear, and the tail, with the body and legs clearly visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: long-haired dog (Shih Tzu or Lhasa Apso type)
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with dark eyes and a snout partially obscured by long fur, giving a gentle and calm appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head slightly forward and the tail curled over the back.
